title: Supplier re-engages after silence with better commercial terms

proves: Multi-turn supplier sequence after seeded stall context
Per-turn tool + reply discipline visible in UI
doesNotProve: Cross-thread memory beyond this harness history

contextText: Supplier went quiet for 36h after quoting MOQ 1000. Treat next inbound as re-engagement, not a cold start.

goals.text: Reduce MOQ toward 500 without dropping print clarity.

initialHistory.content: [harness] negotiation probe: prior outbound included MOQ concern; supplier silent 36h.
Following up — can you support MOQ 800 at the HKD 12 target? If not, what is the closest you can do?
Sorry for delay — factory was closed. MOQ 800 is ok at HKD 12.2.

sequence.content: If you confirm today, we can do HKD 12.0 at MOQ 800 with same print spec.
